The Smartest Way to Gift in Nigeria

Tell our AI about your recipient, and we'll curate the perfect gift from Nigeria's finest vendors. Birthdays, weddings, corporate — we've got you covered.

How It Works

Three simple steps to the perfect gift

Step 1

Describe Your Recipient

Tell us who the gift is for — their interests, the occasion, and your budget.

Step 2

Get AI Picks

Our AI curator GiftGenius analyses your input and recommends the best gifts from our catalogue.

Step 3

Order & Deliver

Choose your favourites, checkout with Paystack, and we handle the rest.

✨ AI-Powered

Let Our AI Find the Perfect Gift

Our AI understands Nigerian culture and gifting traditions. Whether it's an Owambe, a wedding, or a corporate hamper, GiftGenius knows exactly what to recommend.

  • Understands Nigerian gifting culture — Owambe, weddings, naming ceremonies
  • Personalised to recipient's interests, age, and relationship
  • Budget-aware: from ₦5,000 to ₦500,000+
  • Learns from your preferences over time
Try AI Curator
You said:

"Gift for my sister Amaka, 28, loves skincare and cooking. Birthday gift, budget ₦15,000 – ₦30,000"
